scripts.dev:frontend: node scripts/run-with-port.mjs frontend development -- next dev
scripts.dev:backend: node scripts/run-with-port.mjs backend development BACKEND_ONLY=true ENGINE_PATH=../engine/chess-engine -- ts-node --project tsconfig.server.json server.ts
scripts.dev:full: node scripts/run-with-port.mjs full-stack development ENGINE_PATH=../engine/chess-engine -- ts-node --project tsconfig.server.json server.ts
scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:engine && npm run dev:full
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:server
scripts.start:frontend: node scripts/run-with-port.mjs frontend production -- node scripts/start-standalone.mjs
scripts.start:backend: node scripts/run-with-port.mjs backend production BACKEND_ONLY=true -- node dist/server.js
scripts.start:full: node scripts/run-with-port.mjs full-stack production -- node dist/server.js
scripts.test:server: npm run test:config && npm run test:queue && npm run test:protocol && npm run test:engine-filter && npm run test:evaluation && npm run test:difficulty && npm run test:terminal && npm run test:promotion && npm run test:training-machine && npm run test:ownership
